creator: yssu@CCCA.NCTU.edu.tw
text:
The original makefile make the target mysql/pgsql after building
	binaries. It will install the binaries without mysql/pgsql support.

Fix: A path file for ports/mail/ezmlm-idx/Makefile
	** I have not tested this makefile with mysql support. **
	** I am not sure whether this makefile is working well with mysql. **
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
